success_factors: End-to-end workflow reached finalize with status=success and no runtime errors/warnings.
Import-based adapter strategy matched repo characteristics (high import feasibility: 0.87) and enabled healthy MCP startup.
Core module discovery identified practical Qlib entry points (init, workflow, trainer, backtest, model/strategy classes).
Generated MCP scaffold included standard operational files (entrypoint, adapter, service, requirements, README).
failure_reasons: Quality gap: original project tests were not passed/executed meaningfully despite reported 100% coverage metadata inconsistency.
DeepWiki augmentation failed, reducing external contextual analysis depth.
Generated service appears shallow (tool_endpoints=0 in generation metrics vs discovered endpoint list), indicating instrumentation/metadata mismatch.

node_performance.download_time: Completed successfully via zip fallback; acceptable for a large repository (519 files).
node_performance.analysis_time: Completed successfully with medium complexity outputs and dependency/risk profiling; likely major share of total runtime.
node_performance.generation_time: Completed quickly with minimal scaffold creation (7 files), but generated LOC/size metrics are zero indicating weak measurement or thin implementation.
node_performance.test_time: MCP health check passed (stdio healthy), but original-project validation is insufficient; test phase quality is limited.

resource_usage.memory_efficiency: Unknown/unevaluable due to missing telemetry (reported 0 MB).
resource_usage.disk_usage: Low recorded plugin artifact footprint, but size metrics are likely not captured correctly.
